translation_notes: Volatility breakout modeled as price crossing Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower) with ATR confirmation. Exit triggers when price closes back inside the bands (time window expired without sustained move). Stop-loss set at 2% reflecting concept failure within window. Hold_days_max set to 20 to represent typical time window for volatility setup expiration. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as rule applies to both long and short breakouts.
validation_issues: entry_long: phantom condition 'atr_14 > 0' is always true
entry_short: phantom condition 'atr_14 > 0' is always true
